x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: CI relationships are the traversal path Now Assist uses to perform impact analysis. Low relationship coverage limits the depth of AI impact assessments.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Enable Service Mapping and run discovery patterns to auto-populate CI relationships. Manually define relationships for key business-critical CIs via cmdb_rel_ci_list.do. Target: 5+ relationships per CI on average. CI relationships are the traversal path Now Assist uses for impact analysis.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_bef81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c1e
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[CI relationships are the traversal path Now Assist uses to perform impact analysis. Low relationship coverage limits the depth of AI impact assessments.]]></ai_justification><check_name>CI Relationship Coverage</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaRels = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_rel_ci');
    gaRels.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaRels.query();
    var rels = gaRels.next() ? parseInt(gaRels.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaCIs = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci');
    gaCIs.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaCIs.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaCIs.query();
    var cis = gaCIs.next() ? parseInt(gaCIs.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (cis === 0) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'No active CIs found',
            finding: 'No active CIs found. CI relationship coverage cannot be assessed.' };
    }

    var ratio = Math.round(rels / cis);
    var actualValue = rels + ' total CI relationships | ' + cis + ' active CIs | ~' + ratio + ' relationships per CI';

    if (ratio >= 5) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: '~' + ratio + ' relationships per CI. Now Assist has rich CI relationship data for AI impact traversal and dependency analysis.' };
    } else if (ratio >= 1) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ~' + ratio + ' relationship(s) per CI (target: 5+). Limited relationship coverage reduces the depth of Now Assist AI impact analysis.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No CI relationships found. Now Assist cannot perform impact analysis without CI relationships — isolated CIs provide zero traversal context for AI.' };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>CMDB</module><number>CHK0000383</number><order>110</order><remediation_guidance>Enable Service Mapping and run discovery patterns to auto-populate CI relationships. Manually define relationships for key business-critical CIs via cmdb_rel_ci_list.do. Target: 5+ relationships per CI on average. CI relationships are the traversal path Now Assist uses for impact analysis.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>bef81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c1e</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>CI Relationship Coverage</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_bef81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c1e</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
